Title: Establishes prescribed pediatric extended care centers
Summary: Directs the department of health to establish and administer a program for the certification, operation, and oversight of two prescribed pediatric extended care centers to provide supportive services to medically stable and medically complex children who require continual care.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to establishing prescribed pediatric extended care centers; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
